text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The Arima Kinen is finally here, and among the
elite runners of the Ultimate Era...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: A young racer steps up to challenge them.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Hey, d'you wanna try jumping out the starting
gate? Could be fun.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
There's Gold Ship, the Double Crown champion
this year, who's rocked up at Nakayama with a
full head of steam.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
Stop bothering me before the race! Besides, no
one is foolish enough to jump out of the gate!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Aw, man... I'm really not feelin' it today, so I
thought if you did that, it'd help me get in the
mood to race...

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Yeesh, doesn't anyone have drive nowadays?
Fine, I'll just have to do this myself.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: Golshi's gonna let loose!

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
Today's race is filled with nothing but
unconventional and unwieldy racers from every
generation.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: If I take first place against all of them...

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
I can finish my career on a beautiful note as a
racer with glory to her name.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: It'll be a magnificent and fitting end to it all.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Her words sound so final... I can't hold my tongue
anymore.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
Is this... a schedule for races after the Arima
Kinen?

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: Did you make this?
choice_data_list:
Yes. Though it might be a little rough around
the edges...

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
Indeed, it needs some adjustments, but may I ask
why you drafted it in the first place?
choice_data_list: Because I want you to keep racing!
Because I want you to keep racing!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Maybe, just maybe, if running still has a place in
the most important timetable of her life, then...
choice_data_list: I want to see you run!
I want to see you run!

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
Trainer. This notebook contains a schedule I
mapped out for the next ten years of my life.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Riiip! Rip! RIP!

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
...That made me feel a great deal guiltier than I
anticipated.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
Earlier, I said that this would be the end... but
that final ending of mine has yet to be decided.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
I have already made my parents proud.
Therefore, I no longer have a reason to continue
running.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
However, my desire to keep running, to keep
racing—it's still here, and it's as strong as ever.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
So I asked myself, "What would those I admire do
in this situation?"

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
My parents would likely maintain their
predetermined trajectory to the end.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
In your case, however... I believe you would say
that pursuing my desire to keep racing would be
the right thing to do.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
Let's create a schedule for my future plans when
we get back.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
This Arima Kinen isn't the end of my career, but
the beginning of our new path together...

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: And so, I shall claim a worthy victory for you!
